versions.notes: Initial production version. Adds refusal clause, anti-patterns, two few-shot examples (happy path + vague/refusal-triggered). Aligns to BriefSchema in apps/api/src/ai/index.ts.
Initial production version. Enforces domain enum, Fibonacci storyPoints, blocked-epic pattern. Two few-shot examples (full example + blocked epic stub).

Initial production version. Enforces step format [Actor]: [action], coverage requirement (happy path, validation failure, system error, empty state, loading state). Two few-shot examples (complex multi-step booking + simple notification journey).
Initial production version. Enforces GWT AC format, banned words, 4-16h estimate bounds, split-by-layer heuristic. Three few-shot examples (backend endpoint, frontend component, integration/webhook).
